name: Squeaky
bio:
Ratman Sage Mentor. His profound knowledge and magic make him a key supporter in the Net of Secrets.

Role: Magical Heal
Intro: A Support hero that deals Magical Damage to a single enemy and has a certain healing ability.

skillSlots.name: Hexshot Healing
skillSlots.description: Deals 100% M.DMG to single enemy target and recovers HP equal to 73% ATK for 2 ally targets with lowest HP Ratio.

skillSlots.name: Wizard Lineage
skillSlots.description: Increases HP by 10% and ATK by 5%.
